logs.message: All header, cookie, path, and query parameters default to string since Postman does not specify the type.
Postman collections do not represent whether a property is required or optional. The SDK Generator will generate this property as optional.
Postman collection does not specify if the request body is required, so the SDK requires a request body by default.
Parameters, properties, and request bodies default to nullable since Postman collections do not specify nullability. Some fields may be incorrectly marked as nullable.
